name: texas-hold-em-utils

metadata.name: texas-hold-em-utils
metadata.summary: A package containing the logic for a Texas Hold 'Em game, along with some related utilities.

documentation:
# texas-hold-em

A package containing the logic for a Texas Hold 'Em game, along with some related utilities.

[Docs](https://github.com/amarkules1/texas-hold-em/blob/main/texas_hold_em_utils/texas_hold_em_utils.md)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.preflop_stats_repository.PreflopStatsRepository.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for the PreflopStatsRepository
\:param use_database: Default False. gets the data from the database if True and DATABASE_CONN_STRING env variable is set,
otherwise gets the data from the csv file. If you don't know what to set this to, leave it as False.

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.preflop_stats_repository.PreflopStatsRepository.get_win_rate
documentation:
Gets win rate and related info for the given cards and player count
\:param card1_rank: 0-12, 0 is 2, 12 is Ace
\:param card2_rank: 0-12, 0 is 2, 12 is Ace
\:param suited: True if the cards are the same suite, False otherwise
\:param player_count: number of players in the game
\:return: a dict with the following values: card_1_rank, card_2_rank, suited, win_rate, rank, percentile,
player_count, sklansky, sklansky_position, modified_sklansky, modified_sklansky_position

modules.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands
documentation: HAND_FUNCTIONS need to be operated on in the below order BUT ranks are the other way: Royal Flush = 7, and High Card = 0

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfTwo.add_card
documentation:
Adds a card to the hand if there are less than 2 cards
\:param card:
\:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfFive.__init__
documentation:
---
param community_cards: list of 5 cards
param hand_cards: list of 2 cards
---

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfFive.determine_best
documentation:
Determines the best hand from the hand and community cards
\:param hand_cards: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 5 cards
\:return: the 5 cards that make up the best hand, ordered so that the hand is easily compared to other hands
Ex: a straight flush would be ordered from highest to lowest card, a full house would be ordered with the three
of a kind first, then the pair

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfFive.__gt__
documentation:
Compares two hands to see if the first hand is better than the second
\:param other: the other hand to compare to
\:return: True if this hand is better than the other, False otherwise (including when they are equal)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfFive.__eq__
documentation:
Compares two hands to see if they are equal
\:param other: the other hand to compare to
\:return: True if the hands are equal, False otherwise

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.hands.HandOfFive.__lt__
documentation:
Compares two hands to see if the first hand is worse than the second
\:param other: the other hand to compare to
\:return: True if this hand is worse than the other, False otherwise (including when they are equal)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.deck.Deck.__init__
documentation: Initializes a deck of 52 cards (does not shuffle)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.deck.Deck.shuffle
documentation:
Shuffles the deck randomly
:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.deck.Deck.draw
documentation:
Removes a card from the deck and returns it
\:return: the card drawn

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.deck.Deck.remove
documentation:
Removes a specific card from the deck
\:param card: the card to be removed
\:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.Player.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a player with a position (0 to n-1) and chips
\:param position: int from 0 to n-1
\:param chips: int representing the number of chips the player starts with (default 1000)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.Player.bet
documentation:
Bets the given amount if the player has enough chips, otherwise bets all chips
\:param amount: amount the player wants to bet
\:return: the amount the player actually bets

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.Player.fold
documentation:
Folds the player's hand and marks them as out of the round
\:return: the player's round bet (0)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.Player.decide
documentation:
Abstract method for deciding what to do in a round
\:param round_num: 0 for pre-flop, 1 for flop, 2 for turn, 3 for river
\:param pot: the current pot
\:param all_day: the current highest bet (including all rounds)
\:param big_blind: the big blind for the game
\:param community_cards: the community cards (list of 0 to 5 cards)
\:param player_ct: number of players in the game
\:return: a tuple of the action ("fold", "check", "call", "raise") and the amount to bet

classes.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.SimplePlayer

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.SimplePlayer.decide
documentation:
Simple player calls big blind, then checks, folds to any bet past BB
\:param round_num: 0 for pre-flop, 1 for flop, 2 for turn, 3 for river
\:param pot: the current pot
\:param all_day: the current highest bet (including all rounds)
\:param big_blind: the big blind for the game
\:param community_cards: the community cards (list of 0 to 5 cards)
\:param player_ct: number of players in the game
\:return: a tuple of the action ("fold", "check", "call", "raise") and the amount to bet
Simple player calls big blind, then checks, folds to any bet past BB

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.AllInPreFlopPlayer.decide
documentation:
Goes all in preflop if win rate is above threshold, otherwise check/folds
\:param round_num: 0 for pre-flop, 1 for flop, 2 for turn, 3 for river
\:param pot: the current pot
\:param all_day: the current highest bet (including all rounds)
\:param big_blind: the big blind for the game
\:param community_cards: the community cards (list of 0 to 5 cards)
\:param player_ct: number of players in the game
\:return: a tuple of the action ("fold", "check", "call", "raise") and the amount to bet

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.LimpPlayer.decide
documentation:
Calls if win rate is above threshold, otherwise check/folds
\:param round_num: 0 for pre-flop, 1 for flop, 2 for turn, 3 for river
\:param pot: the current pot
\:param all_day: the current highest bet (including all rounds)
\:param big_blind: the big blind for the game
\:param community_cards: the community cards (list of 0 to 5 cards)
\:param player_ct: number of players in the game
\:return: a tuple of the action ("fold", "check", "call", "raise") and the amount to bet

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.player.KellyMaxProportionPlayer.decide
documentation:
decides whether to check/fold/call/raise based on the kelly criterion and round proportion
bet size is rounded to the nearest multiple of the big blind
\:param round_num: 0 for pre-flop, 1 for flop, 2 for turn, 3 for river
\:param pot: the current pot
\:param all_day: the current highest bet (including all rounds)
\:param big_blind: the big blind for the game
\:param community_cards: the community cards (list of 0 to 5 cards)
\:param player_ct: number of players in the game
\:return: a tuple of the action ("fold", "check", "call", "raise") and the amount to bet

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.post_flop_stats_repository.PostflopStatsRepository.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for the PreflopStatsRepository
otherwise gets the data from the csv file. If you don't know what to set this to, leave it as False.

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.post_flop_stats_repository.PostflopStatsRepository.get_percentile
documentation: Gets the percentile for the given win rate, player count, and street

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.get_hand_rank_details
documentation:
Calculates win rate and percentile for a given hand at any point in the game
\:param hand: array of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: array of 3-5 cards or None for pre-flop (default None)
\:param player_count: number of players in the game (default 2)
\:param sample_size: number of simulation runs for sample based win rates (post-flop and post-river (default 1000)
\:return: a dict of:

> {
> "expected_win_rate": float between 0 and 1, based on the player_count,
> "expected_2_player_win_rate": float between 0 and 1, assumes 2 players,
> "percentile": float between 0 and 100, how the hand's win rate compares to possible hands for other players,
> "ideal_kelly_max": float between -1 and 1, how much of their stack the player should bet assuming all other players call
> }

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.rank_hand_post_river
documentation:
Calculates the expected win rate for a given hand post-river in a Texas Hold'em game.

Assumes 2 players. To get the win rate for more than 2 players,
raise the returned value to the number of players minus 1.
Seems to work based on: <https://github.com/amarkules1/texas-holdem-notebooks/blob/main/n_player_win_rates.ipynb>

```
param hand

a list of 2 Card objects representing the player's hand

param community_cards

a list of 4 Card objects representing the flop, turn, and river

return

float: the expected win rate for the given hand
```

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.rank_hand_post_turn
documentation:
Calculates the expected win rate for a given hand post-turn in a Texas Hold'em game.

```
param hand

a list of 2 Card objects representing the player's hand

param flop_and_turn

a list of 4 Card objects representing the flop and turn

param n_other_players

number of other players, excluding the player whose hand is being analyzed (default 1)

param sample_size

number of simulation runs (default 1000)

return

float: the expected win rate for the given hand
```

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.rank_hand_post_flop
documentation:
Calculates the expected win rate for a given hand post-flop in a Texas Hold'em game.

```
param hand

a list of 2 Card objects representing the player's hand

param flop

a list of 3 Card objects representing the flop and turn

param n_other_players

number of other players, excluding the player whose hand is being analyzed (default 1)

param sample_size

number of simulation runs (default 1000)

return

float: the expected win rate for the given hand
```

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.expected_percentile
documentation:
Calculates the expected percentile for a given win rate based on a normal distribution.

```
param win_rate

the expected win rate (e.g., 0.25 for a 25% chance of winning)

param mean

the mean of the normal distribution (e.g., 0.5 )

param std_dev

the standard deviation of the normal distribution (e.g., 0.2 for a 20% std. deviation)

return

the expected percentile (e.g., 10.0 for a win rate in the 10th percentile)
```

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.relative_ranking.compute_kelly_max
documentation:
computes the kelly max for a given win rate and player count
\:param win_rate: win rate as a proportion (0-1)
\:param player_count: player count including bettor
\:return: kelly max assuming all other players call and win rate is accurate (they won't and it's not)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a game of Texas Hold 'Em with the given number of players, big blind, and starting chips
\:param num_players: the number of players in the game, by default these players are simple players
\:param big_blind: The big blind for the game
\:param starting_chips: The number of chips each player starts with

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.deal
documentation:
Deals two cards to each player in the game
:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.flop
documentation:
Deals the flop and adds it to the community cards
\:return: an array of the community cards, in this case just the 3 flopped cards

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.turn
documentation:
Deals the turn and adds it to the community cards
\:return: a list of the community cards, in this case the 3 flop cards plus the turn card

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.river
documentation:
Deals the river and adds it to the community cards
\:return: a list of the community cards, in this case the 3 flop cards plus the turn card and the river card

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.get_bets
documentation:
Gets the bets from each player in the round, keeping track of the pot and the required bet to stay in the round
\:return: the number of players still in the round

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.determine_round_winners
documentation:
Determines the winners of the round based on the best hand of five cards from each player
\:return: a list of players who have the best hand (usually just 1 player)

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game.Game.run_round
documentation:
Runs a round of Texas Hold 'Em
Players must be set up before running the round, rest is handled here, from dealing to payout
:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.from_ints
documentation:
Set the rank and suit of the card from integers
\:param rank: 0 indexed ("2" = 0, "A" = 12) card rank
\:param suit: from 0-3: "Hearts", "Diamonds", "Clubs", "Spades"

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.from_str
documentation:
Set the rank and suit of the card from strings
\:param rank: single character rank ["2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "10"/"T", "J", "Q", "K", "A"]
\:param suit: suit ["Hearts", "Diamonds", "Clubs", "Spades"] (first letter of suit also works)
\:return: self

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.is_higher_than
documentation:
Returns True if this card is higher than the card passed in, False otherwise.
\:param card:
\:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.is_lower_than
documentation:
Returns True if this card is lower than the card passed in, False otherwise.
\:param card:
\:return:

methods.name: texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.get_rank_str
texas_hold_em_utils.card.Card.get_suit_str
documentation:
---
return: the suit of the card as a string
---

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.sklansky.sklansky_playable_position
documentation:
Returns the playable positions for a given Sklansky rank
<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Texas_hold_%27em_starting_hands#Sklansky_hand_groups>
\:param position: int from 1 to 9
\:return: the positions and situations where the hand is playable

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.sklansky.sklansky_rank
documentation:
Returns the Sklansky rank of the two hole cards passed in
<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Texas_hold_%27em_starting_hands#Sklansky_hand_groups>
\:param card1: a Card object
\:param card2: a (different) Card object
\:return: an int from 1 to 9, 1 being the best hand and 9 being the worst

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.get_card_counts
documentation:
Returns a list of the counts of each rank in the hand and community cards
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of integers representing the counts of each rank 2 to Ace

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.get_suite_counts
documentation:
Returns a list of the counts of each suit in the hand and community cards
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of integers representing the counts of each suit Hearts, Diamonds, Clubs, Spades

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_royal_flush
documentation:
Finds a royal flush in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 5 cards (in order from highest to lowest) that make up the royal flush if it exists,
None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_straight_flush
documentation:
Finds a straight flush in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 5 cards (in order from highest to lowest) that make up the (best) straight flush if it exists,
None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_four_of_a_kind
documentation:
Finds a four of a kind in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 4 cards that make up the four of a kind and the highest card not in the four of a kind if it
exists, None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_full_house
documentation:
Finds a full house in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the best full house if it exists (three of a kind first), None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_flush
documentation:
Finds a flush in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 5 cards that make up the best possible flush if one exists, None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_straight
documentation:
Finds a straight in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 5 cards that make up the best possible straight if one exists, None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_three_of_a_kind
documentation:
Finds a three of a kind in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: a list of the three of a kind plus the 2 other highest cards if it exists, None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_two_pair
documentation:
Finds two pair in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: a list of the 2 pairs (higher one first) and the highest card not in the two pairs if it exists, None
otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_single_pair
documentation:
Finds a single pair in the hand and community cards if it exists
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: the pair and the 3 highest cards not in the pair if it exists, None otherwise

functions.name: texas_hold_em_utils.game_utils.find_high_card
documentation:
Orders the hand and community cards by rank and returns the 5 highest cards
\:param hand: list of 2 cards
\:param community_cards: list of 3 to 5 cards
\:return: list of the 5 highest cards
